title: mesua macrophylla
intro: Mesua macrophylla, also known as the horse-saddle tree or mesua, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mesua macrophylla include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea. Herbal preparations of Mesua macrophylla can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and wounds.
